evaluation.summary: Variance-to-mean² ratio for primorial gaps at k=8 exceeds the predicted 1/3 – C/log(P) value, indicating the simple log‑correction model is insufficient.
next_directions: Extend the analysis to larger primorial gaps (k≥9) to assess asymptotic behavior and model robustness.
Explore alternative functional forms (e.g., higher‑order log corrections, power‑law terms) that may capture the observed deviation.
Conduct Monte Carlo simulations of primorial gap generation to quantify statistical fluctuations and rule out boundary or code artifacts.
